scenarios.description: visitor.head replaces a child node to trigger the 'replaced' branch (origSize == parent.childNodeSize)
scenarios.precondition: root with two children; visitor.head on first child calls replaceWith(new Element)
scenarios.expectedResult: traversal continues on the replacement node; original child is not re-visited; no exceptions
pseudocode: Element a = new Element("a"), b = new Element("b");

scenarios.description: three-level single-child tree to trigger the ascension loop twice when no siblings (B16â†’B17â†’B19)
scenarios.precondition: root has one child which has one child (depth 2 chain)
scenarios.expectedResult: head and tail invoked at depths 0,1,2; loop ascends twice without siblings before finishing
pseudocode: Element mid = new Element("d2"), leaf = new Element("d3");
public void head(Node n, int d) { events.add("H:"+n.nodeName()+":"+d); }
public void tail(Node n, int d) { events.add("T:"+n.nodeName()+":"+d); }
